context: Evaluates implementation of a log file tailer with dual-mode encoding support. The candidate must correctly track byte offsets, detect file truncation, support two encoding modes, and implement polling as a fallback to native file watching.

checklist.name: Incremental byte reading
checklist.description: readNewLines reads only the bytes from lastSize to newSize using file descriptor operations (open/read/close or equivalent), not by reading the entire file

checklist.name: Encoding support
checklist.description: In 'livelog' mode decodes bytes as UTF-8; in 'standard' mode decodes as UTF-16LE; correctly updates lastSize after each read

checklist.name: Truncation detection
checklist.description: checkForNewContent detects when file size < lastSize and resets lastSize to 0 rather than attempting a negative-range read

checklist.name: Polling loop with stop
checklist.description: poll() uses setTimeout to schedule itself recursively; when isTailing is false the timer is not rescheduled and any active timer is cleared on stop()

checklist.name: File watcher setup
checklist.description: Uses fs.watch on the target file and calls checkForNewContent on 'change' events; handles missing files gracefully without throwing
